v15_full_data.note: RM incomplete (6/12 combos), pattern clear: old data degrades signal

conclusion.finding: 2016-2019 data represents different market regimes (supply-side reform, pre-COVID) that no longer apply. Adding this data increases trade count but reduces win rate by 3-8 percentage points.
conclusion.recommendation: Use recent data (2020+/2021+) for ML model training. Use full dataset only for walk-forward robustness validation.

optimal_config.JM: n=100 d=5 lr=0.03, next-day label, 1:3 RR, cost 0.06%
